reasoning: SPY at 661.59, perched just $0.40 above critical Carry support at 661.19. Premarket ran from 658.58 (low) to 662.1 (high) in a 3.52-point churn. The battle level is 661.19 (multi-session low, 2★) — if it holds on first retest, bounce target is 663.00; if broken, floor drops to 658.58 (premarket low). Ribbon is BEAR-stacked, VIX rising (25.87, +5.21%), sectors all red (XLK −0.97%, XLF −0.81%, XLE −0.53%, SPY −1.04%). Risk-off sentiment + BEAR stack + rising IV favor downside. Price tested PMH (662.1) at 05:45 ET but backed off; morning likely consolidates around the 661.19/662.1 bracket before directional move.

primary.condition: if SPY holds 661.19 on first test from above

secondary.condition: if SPY breaks below 661.19 in morning flush

tertiary.condition: if SPY reclaims 662.1 on morning push

key_observations: Price sandwiched in $1.09 bracket: 661.19 support (Carry, 2★) below, 662.1 resistance (Active, PMH, 2★) above. This is the critical zone.
Ribbon BEAR + rising VIX (25.87, +5.21%) + all-red sectors = structural downside lean. BEAR stack spread (144 cents) is meaningful — not chop.
Premarket already explored full range (658.58 to 662.1). Morning RTH likely reprices from one edge or consolidates. 661.19 is the pivot — holds = bounce to 663, breaks = gap to 658.58.
Risk-off sentiment evident. Market leaders (XLK, XLF) down 0.8-1.0% overnight. VIX rising into open = protective positioning for lower prices.
